scripts.synth: if [ -z "$CI" ]; then cdk synth --profile cdk-personal; else cdk synth; fi
scripts.diff: if [ -z "$CI" ]; then cdk diff --profile cdk-personal; else cdk diff; fi
scripts.deploy: if [ -z "$CI" ]; then cdk deploy --profile cdk-personal; else cdk deploy; fi
scripts.destroy: if [ -z "$CI" ]; then cdk destroy --profile cdk-personal; else cdk destroy; fi
